hooks.command: p=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path"); rp=$(realpath -m "$p" 2>/dev/null || echo "$p"); case "$rp" in /home/deepgadget/MCS-log-analyzer/reports/*) exit 0 ;; *) echo "[hook:PreToolUse] Write 차단: $p 는 reports/ 외부입니다" >&2; exit 2 ;; esac
echo "[hook] 파일 저장됨: $(echo '$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path','?'))" 2>/dev/null || echo '?')"
REPORT_COUNT=$(ls /home/deepgadget/MCS-log-analyzer/reports/*.md 2>/dev/null | wc -l); echo "[hook:Stop] 분석 완료. 누적 보고서 수: ${REPORT_COUNT}개"
